info.description: High-performance AI gateway routing requests to multiple LLM providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Gemini, Groq, OpenRouter, DeepSeek, Z.ai, xAI, MiniMax, Oracle, Ollama). Drop-in OpenAI-compatible API.
info.title: GoModel API

get.description:
Lists persisted model access overrides by global, provider-wide, model-wide, or exact selector.
Selectors support global "/", provider-wide "provider/", model-wide "model", and exact "provider/model" scopes.

put.summary: Create or update one model access override

parameters.description: URL-encoded model selector such as /, openai/, gpt-4o-mini, or openai/gpt-4o-mini
parameters.name: selector

get.description: Lists persisted USD pricing overrides. Selectors support global "/", provider-wide "provider/", model-wide "model", and exact "provider/model" scopes.

put.description: Stores USD-only pricing for one selector. More precise selectors override broader selectors at runtime.
put.summary: Create or update one model pricing override

parameters.description: URL-encoded pricing selector such as /, openai/, gpt-4o-mini, or openai/gpt-4o-mini
parameters.name: selector

get.description: Runtime-configurable passthrough endpoint under /p/{provider}/{endpoint}; enabled by default via server.enable_passthrough_routes. The endpoint path is opaque and may proxy JSON, binary, or SSE responses with upstream status codes preserved. For multi-segment provider endpoints, clients that rely on OpenAPI-generated path handling should URL-encode embedded slashes in the endpoint parameter. A leading v1/ segment is normalized away by default so /p/{provider}/v1/... and /p/{provider}/... map to the same upstream path relative to the provider base URL.

parameters.description: Provider-native endpoint path relative to the provider base URL. URL-encode embedded / characters when using generated clients.
parameters.name: endpoint

parameters.name: provider

parameters.description: Fields to include in the response
parameters.name: include

parameters.description: Fields to include in the response
parameters.name: include[]

parameters.description: Whether to include obfuscated response data

data.description: Data contains flexible request/response information as JSON

duration_ns.description: DurationNs is the request duration in nanoseconds

id.description: ID is a unique identifier for this log entry (UUID)

provider.description: canonical provider type used for routing and filters

request_id.description: Extracted fields for efficient filtering (indexed in relational DBs)

timestamp.description: Timestamp is when the request started

error_message.description: Error details (message can be long, so kept in JSON)

failover.description:
Failover captures runtime redirect details when translated execution
moved from the primary selector to a configured failover target.

request_body.description:
Optional bodies (when LOGGING_LOG_BODIES=true)
Stored as interface{} so MongoDB serializes as native BSON documents (queryable/readable)
instead of BSON Binary (base64 in Compass)

request_body_too_big_to_handle.description: Body capture status flags (set when body exceeds 1MB limit)

request_headers.description:
Optional headers (when LOGGING_LOG_HEADERS=true)
Sensitive headers are auto-redacted

workflow_features.description:
WorkflowFeatures captures the request-time effective workflow features
after runtime caps were applied. This keeps audit views historically accurate
even if the active process config changes later.

data.description: Data contains flexible request/response information as JSON

duration_ns.description: DurationNs is the request duration in nanoseconds

id.description: ID is a unique identifier for this log entry (UUID)

provider.description: canonical provider type used for routing and filters

request_id.description: Extracted fields for efficient filtering (indexed in relational DBs)

timestamp.description: Timestamp is when the request started

usage.description: Gateway extension: optional usage/result snapshots persisted by the gateway.

provider.description: Gateway routing hint; stripped before upstream execution.
Gateway routing hint; stripped before upstream execution.

content.description:
ContentSchema documents that `content` accepts either a plain string
or an array of ContentPart values.

metadata.description:
Metadata holds optional enrichment data (display name, pricing, capabilities, etc.).
May be nil if the model was not found in the external registry.

effort.description:
Effort controls how much reasoning effort the model should use.
Valid values are "low", "medium", and "high".

input.description: string or []ResponsesInputElement — see docs for array form

provider.description: Gateway routing hint; stripped before upstream execution.

input.description: string or []ResponsesInputElement — see docs for array form

provider.description: Gateway routing hint; stripped before upstream execution.

annotations.description:
Providers can return structured annotation objects here (for example
citations from native tools), so keep the payload shape liberal.

input.description: string or []ResponsesInputElement — see docs for array form

provider.description: Gateway routing hint; stripped before upstream execution.

include_usage.description:
IncludeUsage requests token usage information in streaming responses.
When true, the final streaming chunk will include usage statistics.

output.description: Function call output fields (type="function_call_output") - CallID shared above
